title: what words make you think of Eva
display_title: what words make you think of Eva
wikitext:
[]: what words make you think of Eva?             Quote Post by Kaminoyouni » Fri Jun 15, 2007 12:44 am since my "pharses" thread went to crap i went to take a crack at taking everyday words turned evaish. for instance when ever you would hear a word like "Evangelical" or even "Angel". BTW no pictures this time folks, this is not for captions!

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Fri Jun 15, 2007 1:01 am Words that make me think of Evangelion? "Neon", "genesis", "instrumentality", "complementation", "apostle", "berserker", "libido", "mankind", "decisive", "melons".

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Fri Jun 15, 2007 1:19 am you forgot "Mayo" and "Pribnow box"

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Fri Jun 15, 2007 2:27 am slothen wrote: you forgot "Mayo" and "Pribnow box"

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Fri Jun 15, 2007 4:19 am just cuz its an acronym doesn't mean its not a word.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Fri Jun 15, 2007 4:40 am THE

[]:             Quote Post by zephyr72 » Fri Jun 15, 2007 6:00 am dance dance revolution, though it isnt technically a word `zankoku`

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Fri Jun 15, 2007 9:21 am The phrase MINDFUCK

[]:             Quote Post by Kaysow » Fri Jun 15, 2007 10:45 am Beat me to it Mindfuck it is.

[]:             Quote Post by Bean Bandit » Fri Jun 15, 2007 11:41 am zephyr72 wrote: dance dance revolution, though it isnt technically a word

[]:             Quote Post by Opteron-O3 » Fri Jun 15, 2007 12:26 pm Eva, Evangelion, Church, Apocalypse, deep conversations, few other things...

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Fri Jun 15, 2007 1:02 pm Erm.... "Yebisu"?

[]:             Quote Post by V » Fri Jun 15, 2007 2:22 pm "project" "scenario"

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Jun 15, 2007 2:27 pm Hedgehog's Dillemma Psychology Mindfuck Depression/Anxiety Seperation Anxiety (is a psycholigcal term, y'know, not just a kick-ass BGM ) and everyone's favorite... Thermal Expansion!

[]:             Quote Post by Hailtheplatypus » Fri Jun 15, 2007 2:58 pm Mind Rape Mind Fuck and the phrase "I think my mind exploded a little' Any biblical term and the name Shinji, even if its in other books/ manga...

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Jun 15, 2007 5:57 pm Chalk another up for "Mind Fuck".

[]:             Quote Post by Tokpile Quohog » Fri Jun 15, 2007 6:27 pm Any word within or variation of the phrase, "according to the scenario." And another for "mindfuck".

[]:             Quote Post by Operation Yashima » Sat Jun 16, 2007 3:46 am 7th person for "Mindfuck"...It's getting popular isn't it?

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Sat Jun 16, 2007 6:13 am Evangelion Book, Cross, Mecha.

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Sat Jun 16, 2007 7:12 am Very few now a' days. Probably just instrumentality and other Eva specific jargon.

BTW no pictures this time folks, this is not for captions!
